- [ ] 🎨 Code style update (formatting, renaming)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test update
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] 🚀 CI/CD update

## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an 'x' -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows the style guidelines (PEP 8 for Python, Airbnb for TypeScript)
- [ ] Self-review of code completed
- [ ] Code is commented where necessary
- [ ] No commented-out code or debug statements
- [ ] No console.log() statements in production code

### Documentation
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation (README, AGENTS.md, etc.)
- [ ] Added/updated docstrings and JSDoc comments
- [ ] Updated API documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] Added inline comments for complex logic

### Security
- [ ] No sensitive data (passwords, API keys) in code
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] SQL injection prevention verified
- [ ] XSS prevention verified
- [ ] Authentication/authorization checks in place

### Performance
- [ ] No N+1 query issues
- [ ] Appropriate indexes added (if database changes)
- [ ] Caching implemented where appropriate
- [ ] Bundle size impact acceptable (frontend)

### Database Changes
- [ ] Migration files created (if applicable)
- [ ] Migration tested locally
- [ ] Rollback plan documented

### Environment Variables
- [ ] New environment variables documented in .env.example
- [ ] Environment variables added to Railway (if applicable)

### Deployment
- [ ] Changes tested in development environment
- [ ] Ready for staging deployment
- [ ] Breaking changes documented
- [ ] Rollback plan prepared (if needed)
